code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut count = 0
  mut in_word = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        in_word = false
      else
        if not in_word
          count = count + 1
          in_word = true
        end
      end
    when None
      in_word = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("#{count}")
end
